notes: Australia are without confirmed tournament-ending injuries to Mathew Leckie (hamstring) and Jacob Italiano (groin/adductor), but Popovic has no further fitness concerns and has rotated freely all tournament. Egypt face a significant injury crisis: Ahmed Fattouh is almost certainly out (hamstring tear), Mohamed Salah is a major doubt (hamstring strain, missing training sessions), and Mohamed Abdelmonem (ankle), Hamdy Fathy (groin), and Hossam Abdelmaguid (head) are all listed as doubtful.
